text: Hi, welcome to a short overview over
agent assist. Now in your chats that you
are building on the cup journey builder,
you are able to actually go ahead and
connect a user to an agent at any point
during the interaction during uh
whichever node that you wish to go ahead
and lead to an agent. You can simply
click the add button, go under actions
and one of the nodes is the agent
transfer node. The same node can be
accessed by menu on the left where you
have the agent transfer node available.
If you want to pass on any parameters,
you will be able to go ahead and provide
tags to help with the uh queuing of the
particular chat to the right team.
Now once we're done with this, we move
on to the agent assist part where under
chats we are able to actually see any
chats that have been assigned to users.
You can create views which will allow
agents to go ahead and filter and see
the relevant chats accordingly. Now if a
chat has ended and the agent does have
the choice to reinitiate a chat by
sending a template, these templates can
be approved as per your requirement.
There are only the relevant ones visible
to the agents to send across. Once I
click on send template, the message
would be sent to the user who once
replies is where the chat would become
active. So here we will just simply have
the user respond uh to the chat and as
you can see over here the user has uh
gone ahead and said hello and the chat
is active.
Now there are a lot of interesting
things you can do in a chat. If you hit
the slash key, you will be able to go
ahead and use the canned responses which
can be uh used to quickly uh get the
message across to the user without the
agent having to type them. The agents
can actually provide attachments to be
sent across. They will be able to add
smileys to the response. And all of
these options are uh optional. Of course
they can do audio notes and they are
able to go ahead and uh send users
across to a board journey as well. Now
apart from that the response itself is
something that the agents can go ahead
and uh you know finesse a little by
either pressing the expand key which
will quickly make the message a bit more
finessed than it was otherwise. There's
also an option to rephrase which can
provide you alternate uh views of how
the message can be written instead. Now
before I actually send the message, I
might want to know what actually was
happening in the previous conversation.
And that's where the chat summary is
something that can help the agent
understand the customer's purpose. If
there were bot responses, it will be
able to um summarize the same and agent
responses as well.
On the right hand side, the agents
should be able to see details about the
user uh including their number, their
email and other details that are
relevant as a part of the account. And
that ladies and gentlemen is the short
and sweet overview of the agent assist
module.
